components.name: Button
components.description: Enhances a native `<button>` with variant, size, disabled state, and focus-ring behavior. Composes `KjDisabled` and `KjFocusRing` via `hostDirectives`.

directives.description: Enhances a native `<button>` with variant, size, disabled state, and focus-ring behavior. Composes `KjDisabled` and `KjFocusRing` via `hostDirectives`.

inputs.name: kjVariant
inputs.description: The visual variant of the button. Defaults to `'default'`.

inputs.name: kjSize
inputs.description: The size of the button. Defaults to `'md'`.

inputs.name: kjDisabled
inputs.description: Forwarded from `kjDisabled` via `hostDirectives`.

components.name: Checkbox
components.description: Adds checkbox semantics with Angular forms integration. Supports `formControl`, `formControlName`, and `ngModel` bindings.

directives.description: Adds checkbox semantics with Angular forms integration. Supports `formControl`, `formControlName`, and `ngModel` bindings.

inputs.name: kjChecked
inputs.description: Whether the checkbox is checked. Supports two-way binding.

inputs.name: kjDisabled
inputs.description: Forwarded from `kjDisabled` via `hostDirectives`.

components.name: Form
components.description: Container for a form field. Groups label, input, and error message.

directives.description: Container for a form field. Groups label, input, and error message.

inputs.name: kjFieldInvalid
inputs.description: Whether the field is in an invalid state.

examples: Name is required

directives.description: Label element within a form field.
Error message element. Visible only when field is invalid.

components.name: Input
components.description: Enhances a native `<input>` with Angular forms integration, disabled/invalid state, and focus-ring. Supports `formControl`, `formControlName`, and `ngModel` bindings.

directives.description: Enhances a native `<input>` with Angular forms integration, disabled/invalid state, and focus-ring. Supports `formControl`, `formControlName`, and `ngModel` bindings.

inputs.name: kjInvalid
inputs.description: Whether the input is in an invalid state. Combined with `touched` for ARIA.

inputs.name: kjDisabled
inputs.description: Forwarded from `kjDisabled` via `hostDirectives`.

components.name: Radio
components.description: Container for a group of radio buttons. Manages the selected value.

directives.description: Container for a group of radio buttons. Manages the selected value.
Individual radio button within a `[kjRadioGroup]`. Includes CVA for forms integration.

inputs.name: kjDisabled
inputs.description: Forwarded from `kjDisabled` via `hostDirectives`.

components.name: Select
components.description: Root select container. Manages open/close state via `kjSelectValue` model.

directives.description: Root select container. Manages open/close state via `kjSelectValue` model.

inputs.name: kjSelectValue
inputs.description: The currently selected value. Supports two-way binding.

examples: Apple

directives.description: Trigger button that opens/closes the select listbox. Automatically binds `aria-expanded` to reflect open state.
Listbox container. Provides keyboard navigation (Arrow keys, Home, End, Enter, Space, type-ahead) and ARIA listbox semantics. Hidden when closed.
Individual option inside a `kjSelectContent`. Clicking or pressing Enter/Space calls `select()` on the parent context.

inputs.name: kjOptionValue
inputs.description: The value this option represents.

inputs.name: kjDisabled
inputs.description: Forwarded from `kjDisabled` via `hostDirectives`.

components.name: Toggle
components.description: Adds toggle (press) behavior with Angular forms integration.

directives.description: Adds toggle (press) behavior with Angular forms integration.

inputs.name: kjPressed
inputs.description: Whether the toggle is pressed. Supports two-way binding.

inputs.name: kjDisabled
inputs.description: Forwarded from `kjDisabled` via `hostDirectives`.

components.name: Accordion
components.description: Root accordion container. Manages open/close state for accordion items. Supports `'single'` (only one item open) or `'multiple'` (any number open).

directives.description: Root accordion container. Manages open/close state for accordion items. Supports `'single'` (only one item open) or `'multiple'` (any number open).

inputs.name: kjAccordionType
inputs.description: Whether multiple items can be open simultaneously. Defaults to `'single'`.

directives.description: Individual accordion item. Manages its own expanded state via the parent accordion context.

inputs.name: kjItemValue
inputs.description: The unique value identifying this item within the accordion.

directives.description: Trigger button for an accordion item. Controls expand/collapse. Sets `aria-expanded` and `data-open` attributes based on the item's expanded state.
Accordion content panel. Hidden when the parent item is collapsed. Uses the `hidden` attribute for accessibility-compliant visibility.

components.name: Menu
components.description: Root menu container. Manages open/close state and provides context to child directives. Pairs with `[kjMenuTrigger]`, `[kjMenuContent]`, and `[kjMenuItem]`. Click outside or Escape closes the menu. Clicking the trigger toggles it. Arrow-key navigation, Home/End, and typeahead are handled by `[kjMenuContent]`.

directives.description: Root menu container. Manages open/close state and provides context to child directives. Pairs with `[kjMenuTrigger]`, `[kjMenuContent]`, and `[kjMenuItem]`. Click outside or Escape closes the menu. Clicking the trigger toggles it. Arrow-key navigation, Home/End, and typeahead are handled by `[kjMenuContent]`.
Trigger element that toggles the parent menu. Automatically sets `aria-haspopup` and `aria-expanded` on the host element.

Menu content panel. Hidden when closed via the `hidden` attribute. Provides keyboard navigation: Arrow keys, Home/End, Escape, and typeahead. Click-outside dismissal is handled via a document-level click listener.
Individual menu item. Closes the menu on click or keyboard activation (Enter/Space).
Closes the parent menu when clicked. Convenience directive for non-item close buttons. Place anywhere inside `[kjMenu]`.

components.name: Tabs
components.description: Root tabs container. Manages active tab value.

directives.description: Root tabs container. Manages active tab value.

inputs.name: kjTabsValue
inputs.description: Two-way bound active tab value.

directives.description: Container for tab triggers. Sets `role="tablist"`.
Individual tab trigger. Sets `role="tab"` and manages `aria-selected`.

inputs.name: kjTabValue
inputs.description: The value this tab represents.

directives.description: Tab panel content. Hidden when not active.

inputs.name: kjPanelFor
inputs.description: The tab value this panel corresponds to.

components.name: Dialog
components.description: Trigger that opens the dialog. Place on any button or interactive element. Takes a `TemplateRef` input that defines the full overlay structure. The template should contain `[kjDialogOverlay]` (backdrop) wrapping `[kjDialog]` (panel). Inside the panel use `[kjDialogTitle]` and `[kjDialogClose]`. Export `kjDialog` as a template ref (`#dlg="kjDialog"`) to call `dlg.close(result?)`.

directives.description: Trigger that opens the dialog. Place on any button or interactive element. Takes a `TemplateRef` input that defines the full overlay structure. The template should contain `[kjDialogOverlay]` (backdrop) wrapping `[kjDialog]` (panel). Inside the panel use `[kjDialogTitle]` and `[kjDialogClose]`. Export `kjDialog` as a template ref (`#dlg="kjDialog"`) to call `dlg.close(result?)`.

Panel container for the dialog. Place inside the template provided to `[kjDialogTrigger]`. Auto-sets `role="dialog"`, `aria-modal`, and `aria-labelledby` (requires `[kjDialogTitle]` inside). Export as `#dlg="kjDialog"` to call `dlg.close(result?)` from event handlers.
Backdrop/overlay element. Place inside the template wrapping `[kjDialog]`. Closes the dialog on click when `[kjDialogOverlayCloseOnClick]` is true (default).
Marks the dialog title. Sets `id` for `aria-labelledby` wiring on `[kjDialog]`.
Closes the dialog on click without a result value. For closing with a result, use `#dlg="kjDialog"` then `(click)="dlg.close(value)"`.

components.name: Popover
components.description: Root popover container. Manages open state, ARIA wiring, and click-outside dismissal. Pairs with `[kjPopoverTrigger]` and `[kjPopoverContent]`. Click outside or Escape closes the popover. Clicking the trigger toggles it. `aria-expanded` and `aria-controls` are automatically set on the trigger.

directives.description: Root popover container. Manages open state, ARIA wiring, and click-outside dismissal. Pairs with `[kjPopoverTrigger]` and `[kjPopoverContent]`. Click outside or Escape closes the popover. Clicking the trigger toggles it. `aria-expanded` and `aria-controls` are automatically set on the trigger.

inputs.name: kjPopoverSide
inputs.description: Preferred side for the popover panel. Used via `data-side` for CSS. Defaults to `'bottom'`.

inputs.name: kjPopoverAlign
inputs.description: Alignment along the cross-axis. Used via `data-align` for CSS. Defaults to `'start'`.

directives.description: Trigger button that toggles the popover. Automatically sets `aria-expanded` and `aria-controls` on the host element.

Popover content panel. Hidden when closed. Uses `hidden` attribute for accessibility-compliant visibility. Click-outside and Escape both dismiss it. Clicks inside the panel are stopped so they don't bubble to the document listener.
Closes the parent popover when clicked. Place inside `[kjPopoverContent]`.

components.name: Toast
components.description: Marks an element as a toast notification item with ARIA role and variant data attribute. Use inside a `[kjToastViewport]` template with `@for`.

directives.description: Marks an element as a toast notification item with ARIA role and variant data attribute. Use inside a `[kjToastViewport]` template with `@for`.

inputs.name: kjToastVariant
inputs.description: The visual and semantic variant. Defaults to `'default'`.

finance.content:
@for (t of vp.toasts(); track t.id) {
{{ t.message }}
}

directives.description: Container directive for the toast region. Exposes the active `toasts` signal from `KjToastService` so the template can iterate and render them.
Dismiss button for a toast. Call with the toast `id` to remove it from the queue.

inputs.name: kjToastClose
inputs.description: The `id` of the toast to dismiss on click.

components.name: Tooltip
components.description: Root tooltip container. Manages show/hide state with hover/focus delays. Pairs with `[kjTooltipTrigger]` and `[kjTooltipContent]`. The trigger automatically receives `aria-describedby` pointing to the tooltip id. Add `role="tooltip"` and the matching `id` to the content element.

directives.description: Root tooltip container. Manages show/hide state with hover/focus delays. Pairs with `[kjTooltipTrigger]` and `[kjTooltipContent]`. The trigger automatically receives `aria-describedby` pointing to the tooltip id. Add `role="tooltip"` and the matching `id` to the content element.

inputs.name: kjTooltipSide
inputs.description: Preferred tooltip side. Used as `data-side` for CSS positioning. Defaults to `'top'`.

inputs.name: kjTooltipDelay
inputs.description: Delay in ms before showing the tooltip on hover. Defaults to `600`.

inputs.name: kjTooltipHideDelay
inputs.description: Delay in ms before hiding the tooltip after hover ends. Defaults to `200`.

examples: Saves your changes permanently

directives.description: Trigger element for the tooltip. Shows on hover/focus, hides on leave/blur/Escape. Automatically receives `aria-describedby` pointing to the tooltip panel.

Tooltip content panel. Hidden unless the trigger is hovered or focused. Add `role="tooltip"` and set the `id` to match the trigger's `aria-describedby`. The `data-side` attribute reflects `kjTooltipSide` and can be used for CSS positioning.

components.name: Chart
components.description: Wraps Apache ECharts. Initializes after first render, updates reactively, disposes on destroy. Always provide `kjChartLabel` for WCAG AAA compliance.

directives.description: Wraps Apache ECharts. Initializes after first render, updates reactively, disposes on destroy. Always provide `kjChartLabel` for WCAG AAA compliance.

inputs.name: kjChartOption
inputs.description: ECharts option object defining the chart.

inputs.name: kjChartLabel
inputs.description: Accessible label for the chart. Required for WCAG AAA compliance.

components.name: Table
components.description: Wraps TanStack Angular Table. Accepts `kjTable` (columns) and `kjTableData` signal inputs and exposes the table instance (rows, headers, sorting) via the `KJ_TABLE` context token. Use `table` to access the full TanStack `Table<T>` instance in templates via `exportAs: 'kjTable'`.

directives.description: Wraps TanStack Angular Table. Accepts `kjTable` (columns) and `kjTableData` signal inputs and exposes the table instance (rows, headers, sorting) via the `KJ_TABLE` context token. Use `table` to access the full TanStack `Table<T>` instance in templates via `exportAs: 'kjTable'`.

inputs.name: kjTableData
inputs.description: Data rows for the table.

directives.description: Marks a `<th>` as a sortable column header. Sets `aria-sort` based on TanStack sort state. Clicking toggles sort direction only when the column has sorting enabled. If `enableSorting: false` is set on the column def, the header renders as plain text.

components.name: Avatar
components.description: Container for avatar. Tracks image load state.

directives.description: Container for avatar. Tracks image load state.
Image element within a `[kjAvatar]` container.
Fallback shown when image is unavailable.

components.name: Badge
components.description: Marks an element as a badge via data attributes.

directives.description: Marks an element as a badge via data attributes.

inputs.name: kjBadgeVariant
inputs.description: The visual variant of the badge. Defaults to `'default'`.

components.name: A11y
components.description: Wires `aria-describedby` to one or more element IDs. Accepts a single ID string or an array of ID strings. Removes the attribute automatically when the value is empty.

directives.description: Wires `aria-describedby` to one or more element IDs. Accepts a single ID string or an array of ID strings. Removes the attribute automatically when the value is empty.

inputs.name: kjDescribedBy
inputs.description: One or more element IDs to reference via `aria-describedby`.

directives.description: Traps keyboard focus within the host element using a native Tab-key interceptor. Designed for modal dialogs, drawers, and other overlay patterns.

inputs.name: kjFocusTrapEnabled
inputs.description: Whether the focus trap is active. Set to true when the overlay is open.

directives.description: Marks an element as an ARIA live region and exposes an `announce` method for programmatically pushing announcements to screen readers via DOM text content.

inputs.name: kjPoliteness
inputs.description: The ARIA live politeness setting. Defaults to `'polite'`.

directives.description: Visually hides an element while keeping it accessible to screen readers. Uses the standard visually-hidden CSS technique via inline styles.

components.name: Primitives
components.description: Shared ControlValueAccessor primitive. Compose via `hostDirectives` on any form input directive (KjInput, KjCheckbox, etc.) to wire Angular reactive forms and template-driven forms automatically. The host directive calls `notifyChange(value)` on user input and `notifyTouched()` on blur. The directive handles all CVA plumbing.

directives.description: Shared ControlValueAccessor primitive. Compose via `hostDirectives` on any form input directive (KjInput, KjCheckbox, etc.) to wire Angular reactive forms and template-driven forms automatically. The host directive calls `notifyChange(value)` on user input and `notifyTouched()` on blur. The directive handles all CVA plumbing.
Applies disabled state to any element via ARIA and data attributes. Compose via `hostDirectives` on other directives to add disabled behavior.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Whether the element is disabled. Reflects via `aria-disabled` and `data-disabled`.

directives.description: Tracks focus-visible state using native PointerEvents and keyboard interaction. Sets `data-focus-visible` only when the element receives focus via keyboard. Compose via `hostDirectives` to add focus-ring behavior to interactive elements.
